news.t: Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year

overview.description: The Pacer Swan SOS Fund of Funds ETF (PSFF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds of Pacer Swan SOS ETFs that provide exposure to US securities while limiting downside risk with buffers and caps over one year. PSFF was launched on Dec 29, 2020 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs celebrates an incredible year of growth driven by its suite of strategy-driven, rules-based ETFs, capped off by the outstanding achievement of reaching $19....
